TAPEGRP  TAPE            + +
SG2      POOL            + -
  SPACE INFORMATION:

  TRACK-MANAGED SPACE = 8120MB USAGE% = 98 ALERT% = 0

VOLUME UNIT MVS  SYSTEM= 1 2                             STORGRP NAME
VOL001 A335 ONRW         + +                               SG1
VOL002                   + +                               SG1
VOL010                   + -                               SG2
LISTVOL IS IGNORED FOR OBJECT, OBJECT BACKUP, AND TAPE STORAGE GROUPS
***************************** LEGEND *****************************
. THE STORAGE GROUP OR VOLUME IS NOT DEFINED TO THE SYSTEM
+ THE STORAGE GROUP OR VOLUME IS ENABLED
- THE STORAGE GROUP OR VOLUME IS DISABLED
SYSTEM  1 = SYS1       SYSTEM  2 = SYS2
